description: Trade event definition table. One row per event execution. Stores who performed the event and from which user group. Joined to EVT_IMP_DBF via EVT_EVENT_DBF.M_REFERENCE = EVT_IMP_DBF.M_EVT.

fields.remark: Primary key. Join target from EVT_IMP_DBF.M_EVT.
Username of the user who performed the event. PII — must be tokenised before any LLM processing.
The Murex user group from which the event was performed (e.g. SLBMO_BOES, GL_PROCESS).
